title: notocactus ottonis subsp. horstii
intro: Notocactus ottonis subsp. horstii, also known as Horst's Notocactus, is a cactus plant species native to Brazil, belonging to the Echinocactinae subfamily. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, attributed to its alkaloid and glycoside content. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and has been used to treat skin conditions and wounds. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, although modern research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
